name: devdocket-ai-reviewer
description: AI-powered code review and PR walkthrough actions for DevDocket

chatParticipants.name: walkthrough
chatParticipants.description: Interactive PR walkthrough — explains code changes step by step

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-readFile
languageModelTools.description: Read the contents of a file in a PR worktree
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the full contents of a file at the given path within a git worktree. Use this to examine source files, configuration, tests, or any other file in the repository.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-listDirectory
languageModelTools.description: List files and directories in a PR worktree
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List files and subdirectories at a given path within a git worktree. Use this to explore the repository structure and discover files.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree

dirPath.description: Directory path relative to worktree root (default: root)

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-getDiff
languageModelTools.description: Get the full unified diff for a PR
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the full unified diff between the base and head refs of a pull request. Returns the complete set of changes across all files.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-getFileDiff
languageModelTools.description: Get the unified diff for a specific file in a PR
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the unified diff for a single file between the base and head refs of a pull request. Use this to examine changes to a specific file.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree

filePath.description: Path to the file relative to worktree root

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-gitLog
languageModelTools.description: Get recent commit history, optionally for a specific file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get recent git commit history in the worktree, optionally scoped to a specific file. Use this to understand the change history and context of the code.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree

filePath.description: Optional file path to scope history

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-searchCode
languageModelTools.description: Search for a pattern in the codebase using git grep
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for a text pattern across the codebase using git grep. Use this to find callers, usages, related code, or any text pattern in the repository.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the git worktree

fileGlob.description: Optional file glob to restrict search

languageModelTools.name: devdocket-diffAnchor
languageModelTools.description: Compute SHA-256 anchor hash for a file path in a GitHub PR diff URL
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Compute the SHA-256 hex digest of a file path, for use as the anchor fragment in GitHub PR diff URLs (e.g. #diff-{hash}). Call this tool whenever you need to generate a link to a file in the PR diff view. Never attempt to compute SHA-256 yourself.

filePath.description: Relative file path as shown in the diff (e.g. 'src/index.ts')

devDocketAiReview.customPromptPath.description: Path to a custom code review prompt file. The file content replaces the built-in review instructions sent to the language model. The PR diff is always appended automatically. Supports absolute paths and paths relative to the workspace folder (single-root workspaces only).
